content: Remote OK Scrum Master Blackstone Talent Group <p><strong>Scrum Master (Contractor) â Job Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Position Details:</p><p><strong>Location:</strong> Dallas, Tx (Remote)</p><p><strong>Type</strong>: 6 Month Contract - NO C2C</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Responsibilities: </strong></p><ul><li>Support Agile delivery for assigned team(s) under guidance of the Senior Scrum Master Lead</li><li>Facilitate team-level Agile ceremonies (daily standups, spring planning, refinement, reviews, etc.)</li><li>Maintain team boards and delivery artifacts (e.g., Jira storyboards, sprint backlogs) ensuring work is current and accurately tracked</li><li>Assist with sprint forecasting, capacity planning and backlog readiness</li><li>Track and escalate impediments, risks, and dependencies to the Senior Scrum Master Lead, follow through on action items</li><li>Help monitor and report basic delivery metrics and support status updates</li><li>Promote Agile best practices and help the team adopt consistent working agreements and continuous improvement actions</li><li>Build working relationships with IT team members and business stakeholders</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Required Skills and Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li>1-3 years of experience in an Agile delivery role</li><li>Working knowledge of Scrum fundamentals and Agile principles</li><li>Strong organization and attention to detail</li><li>Clear written and verbal communication skills; able to raise risks/issues early</li><li>Experience with Agile delivery tools such as<strong> Jira</strong>, Confluence, and ServiceNow</li><li>Scrum Master certification a plus</li></ul><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p>Blackstone Talent Group is a division of Blackstone Technology Group, a global IT services and solutions firm that implements technological solutions across commercial industry verticals and the US Federal Government. Blackstoneâs global talent augmentation practice was founded in 1998. Blackstone Talent Group has offices in San Francisco, Denver, Houston, Colorado Springs, and Washington, DC. By centralizing conversations,<br>automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity<br>and execute efficiently.<br><br>Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events<br>daily. Behind those numbers are real<br>people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact.
